apps.name: Smart Timetable
apps.description: Manage your weekly class schedule with smart conflict detection and reminders.

apps.name: Attendance Calculator
apps.description: Track attendance per subject and get alerts when you're at risk of falling below the minimum.

apps.name: Assignment Reminder
apps.description: Never miss a deadline — set due dates, get push notifications, and prioritize your workload.

apps.name: GPA Calculator
apps.description: Calculate your current GPA and simulate grade scenarios to plan your academic performance.

apps.name: Notes Sharing Platform
apps.description: Share, discover, and collaborate on lecture notes with classmates across courses.

apps.name: Exam Countdown
apps.description: A visual countdown to all your upcoming exams with study session planning tools.

apps.name: AI Homework Helper
apps.description: Get AI-powered hints, explanations, and step-by-step solutions for your homework problems.

apps.name: Campus Navigation
apps.description: Interactive campus map with building search, room finder, and shortest path routing.

apps.name: Student Marketplace
apps.description: Buy and sell textbooks, study materials, and campus essentials with fellow students.

apps.name: Skill Exchange Platform
apps.description: Find peers to trade skills — offer tutoring in your strong subjects, learn from others.

requirements.title: Weekly schedule grid view
requirements.description: Display a 7-day, hour-by-hour grid showing all classes at a glance.

requirements.title: Conflict detection
requirements.description: Automatically highlight overlapping class slots and warn the user.

requirements.title: Class reminder notifications
requirements.description: Send push notifications 15 minutes before each class starts.

requirements.title: Import from CSV/ICS
requirements.description: Allow importing an existing timetable from a .ics or .csv file.

requirements.title: Per-subject attendance tracking
requirements.description: Log present/absent for each subject independently.

requirements.title: Minimum attendance alert
requirements.description: Warn when attendance drops below 75% for any subject.

requirements.title: Attendance trend chart
requirements.description: Show a week-by-week attendance trend per subject.

requirements.title: Due date entry form
requirements.description: Simple form to add assignment name, subject, due date, and priority.

requirements.title: Priority sorting
requirements.description: Sort assignments by due date and priority automatically.

requirements.title: Email/push notifications
requirements.description: Send reminders 24h and 2h before a deadline.

requirements.title: Grade input per course
requirements.description: Enter marks and credit hours for each course this semester.

requirements.title: Cumulative GPA simulation
requirements.description: Predict cumulative GPA based on current and projected grades.

requirements.title: Grade scale configuration
requirements.description: Support different grading scales (4.0, 10-point, percentage).

requirements.title: Upload and tag notes
requirements.description: Upload PDF/image notes and tag them by course, topic, and semester.

requirements.title: Search and filter
requirements.description: Full-text search across all shared notes with course/tag filters.

requirements.title: Like and bookmark notes
requirements.description: Let users save favourite notes and see most-liked content.

requirements.title: Exam entry with date/time
requirements.description: Add exams with subject name, date, time, and location.

requirements.title: Visual countdown timers
requirements.description: Show days/hours/minutes remaining for each upcoming exam.

requirements.title: Study session planner
requirements.description: Block out study sessions on a calendar leading up to each exam.

requirements.title: Question input and AI response
requirements.description: Text input to ask a homework question and receive a step-by-step explanation.

requirements.title: Subject-aware context
requirements.description: Allow users to specify the subject so responses are domain-appropriate.

requirements.title: History of past questions
requirements.description: Save and browse previously asked questions and answers.

requirements.title: Interactive campus map
requirements.description: Render a zoomable, pannable campus map with building outlines.

requirements.title: Building and room search
requirements.description: Search for a building or room number and highlight it on the map.

requirements.title: Shortest path routing
requirements.description: Calculate and display the shortest walking path between two campus points.

requirements.title: Listing creation
requirements.description: Post items for sale with title, description, price, condition, and photo.

requirements.title: Search and category filter
requirements.description: Browse listings by category (textbooks, electronics, furniture, etc.).

requirements.title: Contact seller
requirements.description: Message sellers directly within the app to negotiate and arrange pickup.

requirements.title: Skill profile creation
requirements.description: Users list skills they can teach and skills they want to learn.

requirements.title: Match suggestions
requirements.description: Surface peers whose offer matches your need and vice versa.

requirements.title: Session booking
requirements.description: Schedule a skill-exchange session with matched peers via in-app calendar.
